Join 18,000+ readers

Portal News

Independent Journalism. Global Perspective.

Portal News was founded in 2019 with a simple mission: deliver accurate, balanced, and timely news from every corner of the world. What began as a small team of five reporters has grown into a newsroom trusted by millions of readers across the globe.

We believe journalism exists to serve the public, not any single interest. Every story we publish is fact-checked, sourced, and reviewed by our editorial team before it reaches you — because trust is earned one article at a time.

From breaking news to long-form investigations, our correspondents cover politics, business, technology, culture, and everything in between, so you can stay informed no matter where you are.

2019Founded
120+Journalists
45Countries Covered
10M+Monthly Readers

What We Stand For

Accuracy First

Every story is fact-checked and verified by our editorial team before publication. We correct mistakes openly and promptly.

Editorial Independence

Our newsroom operates free from political and commercial influence, so our reporting always serves the reader, not an agenda.

Global Perspective

With correspondents on the ground across 45 countries, we bring context and nuance that wire reports often miss.

Speed With Integrity

Breaking news moves fast, but never faster than the truth. We publish quickly without cutting corners on verification.

Diverse Voices

We actively seek out perspectives from underrepresented communities to tell the full story, not just the loudest one.

Reader First

No paywalls on public-interest reporting. Our readers come before advertisers, algorithms, or page views.

Our Milestones

2019

Portal News Is Founded

Launched by a small team of independent journalists in San Francisco with a single beat: honest, unbiased reporting.

2020

First International Bureau

Opened our first overseas bureau in London, expanding coverage of European politics and economics.

2021

Investigative Desk Launched

Formed a dedicated investigative unit, publishing our first award-nominated series on global supply chains.

2022

Reaching 5 Million Readers

Crossed 5 million monthly readers as our mobile app launched, bringing real-time alerts to a global audience.

2024

Press Freedom Award

Recognized by the International Press Institute for our coverage of press freedom violations worldwide.

2026

Today

Now operating in 45 countries with over 120 journalists, still guided by the same founding principle: report the truth.
